name: DuPont de Nemours, Inc.
business: DuPont is a leading provider of advanced solutions that improve everyday life across healthcare, water, construction and industrial markets. The Company has two reportable segments: Healthcare & Water Technologies and Diversified Industrials. Healthcare & Water Technologies includes high-performance packaging, parts and components for medical device and biopharma markets as well as water filtration and purification technologies. Diversified Industrials includes building technologies and industrial technologies serving aerospace, automotive and printing and packaging markets.

exposures.sentence: Healthcare Technologies delivers specialized materials and product design, prototyping, and manufacturing services tailored for situations where technological advancement is paramount, and the assurance of quality and performance is required.

Water Technologies operates as a pure play provider of advanced water filtration and separation solutions, including elements, modules, and systems serving primarily industrial wastewater and energy markets, municipal and desalination applications, and life sciences and specialty sectors.
Building Technologies provides solutions for the non residential, residential, and repair and remodel construction markets.

Industrial Technologies specializes in the design and production of engineered components, systems, and process solutions used in critical OEM and operational applications across industrial end markets such as automotive, aerospace, printing, and packaging.

The segment focuses on light-weighting vehicles, enhancing safety and efficiency, and improving reliability, durability, and performance for next-generation vehicle, aircraft and industrial platforms.
Within Healthcare Technologies, volume gains were driven by broad-based growth led by medical packaging and biopharma.

The Company's profitability and margin growth will depend in part on the Company's ability to maintain a streamlined operating model and drive sustainable improvements, through among other actions, leveraging technology, as well as artificial intelligence and machine learning ( AI ) and consolidation of manufacturing facilities, transitions to cost-competitive regions and product line rationalizations.

catalysts.event: Aramids Divestiture expected to close around the end of the first quarter 2026
catalysts.sentence: The transaction is expected to close around the end of the first quarter 2026, subject to customary closing conditions and receipt of regulatory approvals.

catalysts.event: Separation of Electronics Business into Qnity on November 1, 2025
catalysts.sentence: On November 1, 2025, the Company completed the separation of its semiconductor and interconnect solutions businesses, (the 'Electronics Business' and the separation of the Electronics Business, the Electronics Separation ) into an independent public company, Qnity Electronics, Inc. ( Qnity ), by way of the distribution to DuPont's stockholders of record as of October 22, 2025, of all the issued and outstanding common stock of Qnity on November 1, 2025 (the Qnity Distribution ).

catalysts.event: Transformational Separation-Related Restructuring Program expected to be completed in 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects the program to be completed in 2026.
